rationale_for_classification: Video contains multiple instructional segments: (1) unboxing and setup of training equipment (cardboard trainer box, foam appendage); (2) product/equipment demonstration (wooden dowels, camera system, knot pusher tool); (3) actual laparoscopic footage of endoloop placement and cinching on a foam appendage. The presence of setup footage, equipment showcases, and educational camera transitions indicates this is instructional content rather than a pure performance video. No narration is audible, but the structure and editing pattern (switching between setup, closeups of materials, and endoscopic views) is consistent with educational/tutorial material.
cannot_score_reason: Video is classified as instructional content documenting setup, equipment, and demonstration rather than a timed competitive performance attempt. The scenes showing unboxing, equipment inspection, and various camera angles/demonstrations do not constitute a single scored attempt.

frame_analyses.description: Title slide with 'Dr Tayyab Ch' attribution
Trainer unboxing: cardboard FLS trainer box visible with instructional materials (scissors, gauze), supplies on wooden table
Closeup of white foam appendage/tissue model on trainer surface showing anatomical realism
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Target structure demonstration for endoloop task

frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic trainer setup with electrosurgical equipment visible; black trainer unit with marked appendage and instruments
Wooden dowel rods displayed — likely representing suture or training material
Camera/endoscope probe with lens visible — equipment for laparoscopic visualization
Endoscopic view of foam appendage with purple/dark colored suture visible; suture appears to be pre-looped around structure
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop deployment or positioning phase visible

frame_analyses.description: Yellow foam appendage in endoscopic view with marked target line (black mark) visible; no suture currently visible
Endoscopic view showing purple suture forming a loop around foam structure; loop appears to be approaching cinch position near marked line
Endoscopic view with blue knot pusher instrument visible; purple suture loop is being cinched with pusher advancing the knot down the appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cinching mechanism demonstrated with proper pusher positioning

frame_analyses.description: Endoscopic view showing suture loop being tightened around foam appendage; loop appears well-positioned near marked target line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final cinching phase with apparent secure placement

frame_analyses.description: Endoscopic view of completed loop around appendage; suture appears tight and positioned at or very near the marked target line; foam appendage shows indent from ligating loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion demonstrated with cinched loop at target location

demonstrated_techniques: Proper foam appendage model setup and identification
Correct endoscopic visualization and field orientation
Loop deployment technique using pre-tied ligating loop
Knot pusher instrument technique for cinching
Proper tension application to secure loop at marked line
Complete loop tightening and appendage ligation
common_errors_addressed: Video demonstrates correct loop placement near marked target (avoids misplaced loops)
Shows proper cinching with pusher to avoid incomplete ligation
Demonstrates perpendicular approach to appendage for effective loop deployment
Shows proper loop positioning before cinching (avoids loose or displaced loops)
technical_highlights: Loop positioned very close to marked target line (≤2mm deviation estimate)
Secure final cinch with visible appendage occlusion

summary: This is instructional educational content documenting FLS Endoloop task setup, equipment, and proper demonstration technique. Multiple segments show: (1) trainer unboxing and material preparation; (2) equipment and tool demonstrations; (3) complete endoscopic demonstration of endoloop placement, targeting, and cinching on a foam appendage model. The video serves as a teaching tool showing correct technique execution rather than a scored performance attempt. The demonstrated technique shows expert-level execution with clean visualization, proper loop positioning near the marked target line, and secure cinching.
not_suitable_for_fls_scoring: This video contains instructional/educational content mixed with equipment demonstration. A valid FLS performance score requires a single, uninterrupted timed attempt from task start to completion without educational breaks or setup sequences. Therefore, FLS scoring rubric cannot be applied to this video.
